payload.description:
## Summary
Build a reliable runner/orchestrator for feedback optimization loops.

## Deliverables
- Start evaluation and capture the evaluation ID immediately.
- Wait on backend evaluation status rather than trusting local CLI exit.
- Collect final metrics and RCA.
- Write a standardized Kanbus comment for each run.
- Treat the evaluation record as the source of truth for run state.
payload.title: Build a reliable evaluation runner/orchestrator for feedback loops
